name: (843) Vortex Mini Rok Engine AUS Complete Cadet 9
description:
• 60CC ENGINE: 2 stroke
  • COOLING SYSTEM:  Air-cooled system
  • EXHAUST:                 Oval exhaust without rib
  • BEARINGS:               Radial bearing C4
  • BORE AND STROKE:  42x43mm
  • MAX POWER:            10 HP a 11.000 Rpm
  • MAX TORQUE:           6.5 Nm a 9.000 Rpm
  • MAX:                           15.500 Rpm
  • IGNITION:                   Selettra analogic ignition
  • CARBURETTOR:        Dell’Orto PHBG Ø 18mm
  • SILENCER:                 Vortex intake silencer
  • FUEL PUMP:              Dell’Orto
  • EXHAUST:                  Mini Rok exhaust with integrated exhaust silencer
  • Piston Port
  • 2 transfer ducts intake
  • Integrated electrical starter
  • Centrifugal dry-clutch
  • Mixture-lubricated
  • Cast iron made cylinder CNC worked

  • 3.5L fuel tank

name: Helmet Dryer
description:
Details

The Capit Helmet Dryer is designed to effectively solve one of the most annoying problems for race drivers: drying and maintaining the temperature of their helmet during races. With its double function of hot/cold air it dries the inside of the helmet in a few minutes without leaving unpleasant smells. It is the only one in the world with the capacity of blowing hot air at 50°C. The ABS shell and robust aluminum components ensure excellent performance. Comes in a special shockproof carrying bag.


Features:

  • Dries your helmet within minutes
  • Removes unpleasant smells
  • Double function hot/cold air
  • Voltage: 230 - 240V
  • Power consumption: 150W
  • Strong ABS shell
  • Made of robust aluminium components
  • Different connections included
  • Shockproof carrying bag included
  • Weight: 2 kg
description_plain: Details The Capit Helmet Dryer is designed to effectively solve one of the most annoying problems for race drivers: drying and maintaining the temperature of their helmet during races. With its double function of hot/cold air it dries the inside of the helmet in a few minutes without leaving unpleasant smells. It is the only one in the world with the capacity of blowing hot air at 50°C. The ABS shell and robust aluminum components ensure excellent performance. Comes in a special shockproof carrying bag. Features: Dries your helmet within minutes Removes unpleasant smells Double function hot/cold air Voltage: 230 - 240V Power consumption: 150W Strong ABS shell Made of robust aluminium components Different connections included Shockproof carrying bag included Weight: 2 kg

name: Honda GX200 Engine Accessory Kit (for ERC Engines)
description:
Includes - Noram GE Clutch Assembly, Clutch Fitting Kit, Chain Guard (engine/clutch side) with bolts, Fuel pump with bracket, bolts, pulse line & fuel line, Engine mounts (2 per engine), ERC Control Muffler (as used for Honda Endurance Karting Since 2012), Billet Accelerator Linkage and adjustable arm upgrade, Chain guard (rear section).

Fitting/race prep availbe for an additional cost.

Seat Tillet T11 Seat - Std
description:
The T11 seat shape is the most popular shape seat with professional karting teams. The flat bottom allows you to get the seat as low as possible and the deep sides give excellent support to the body and reduce potential rib injuries. Machine made so the seat has consistent laminate thickness ensuring perfect replication from seat to seat (great for teams working with many drivers).
A good fit of the seat is essential for the protection of the driver and the handling of the kart. For more information or if you have any questions please ring our DSR-Team or have a look in the Tillett Seat Dimensions Chart!
description_plain: The T11 seat shape is the most popular shape seat with professional karting teams. The flat bottom allows you to get the seat as low as possible and the deep sides give excellent support to the body and reduce potential rib injuries. Machine made so the seat has consistent laminate thickness ensuring perfect replication from seat to seat (great for teams working with many drivers). A good fit of the seat is essential for the protection of the driver and the handling of the kart. For more information or if you have any questions please ring our DSR-Team or have a look in the Tillett Seat Dimensions Chart!
